captions.formal: A time-lapse sequence captures vehicles traveling through a multi-lane intersection on a city street in South Korea, lined with high-rise apartments and yellow ginkgo trees.
captions.sarcastic: Nothing says peaceful autumn quite like watching dozens of tiny metal boxes scramble through a concrete grid in fast-forward.
captions.humorous_tech: This South Korean traffic grid is executing a high-throughput data transfer, but the packet routing at the intersection seems highly chaotic.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The yellow autumn trees are trying their best to look relaxing, but the cars speeding through this intersection clearly have places to be.

captions.formal: A small, fluffy orange kitten sits on the dirt ground before slowly walking forward toward the camera in an outdoor setting surrounded by bushes and trees.
captions.sarcastic: Watch in absolute terror as a ferocious orange beast emerges from the bushes and ruthlessly stalks its target at a snail's pace.
captions.humorous_tech: The local network's orange cat.exe program has successfully booted up and is now slowly migrating directly to the front-facing camera.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This tiny orange lint ball has stepped out of the shrubbery to personally demand to know why his dinner is three minutes late.

captions.formal: A young Black woman with her hair in a high bun sits at an office desk, typing on a keyboard and looking at her computer monitor.
captions.sarcastic: Nothing says exciting career progression quite like staring intently at a computer screen next to a silent potted plant.
captions.humorous_tech: Executing keyboard-smashing protocols at maximum efficiency to make the monitor display look incredibly complex.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Typing with extreme urgency to look busy so nobody behind the desk partition asks to plan another meeting.
